title: [MTR] BB22200
description: I'm working on my first train, the french BB22200
body:
This addon adds three French liveries for the BB 22200 electric locomotive in Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR).

**The pack includes the following skins:**

- BETON livery, inspired by the classic SNCF freight and regional era

- PACA livery, based on the Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur regional design

- OUIGO livery, inspired by the modern low-cost SNCF branding

- Bourgogne livery, based on the Bourgogne-franche-compté regional design

- Infra livery, based on the maintenance locomotive from the SNCF

- Old livery, based on the OCEM age

- Gray livery, The Phantom version

- Fret livery, Today HexaFret but this is the SNCF version

- En Voyage livery, the classic livery of the en voyage series

- Proto livery, the old prototype of the BB22200

In rhe V2, we have added the interior of the locomotive. the 2 cabin 

The locomotive uses pantographs created by two different authors, both credited in the project.

Requirements:
Minecraft, Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR), and a compatible mod loader (Fabric if required).
